extract: Kyogre (Japanese: カイオーガ Kyogre) is a Water-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Kyogre can undergo Primal Reversion and become Primal Kyogre if it holds the Blue Orb. Along with Groudon and Rayquaza, Kyogre is one of the super-ancient Pokémon. Kyogre is the game mascot of Pokémon Sapphire Version and its remake, Pokémon Alpha Sapphire, appearing on the boxart of both games in its normal form and Primal state, respectively. In these games, as well as in Pokémon Emerald Version, Kyogre is sought by Team Aqua as a major part of their plot to expand the world's waters.
